system.description:
Hold the line. Move as one. The wall of spears that does not break.

LEVEL 3

Polearm Mastery. +1 Reach with Polearms (Spears, Glaives, Pole Hammers, etc.). You may wield a Shield and a Polearm and still attack with it. If you do, reduce its damage die and Reach by 1 step.

Skewering Stab. You can perform Opportunity Attacks against enemies that enter the Reach of your weapon. If the movement was forced, attack with Advantage instead of Disadvantage.

LEVEL 7

Together We March. You and any ally within Reach of your weapon gain the following Reaction: (Whenever you or an ally within your weapon's Reach moves) Move alongside this ally up to their speed.

LEVEL 11

Together We Stand. Add 1 to your Combat Die rolls for each ally within your weapon's Reach.

LEVEL 15

Shoulder to Shoulder. Allies within your weapon's Reach gain +1 Reach to their weapons and gain the benefits of your Weapon Masteries.
